architecture_bounds.host_domain: ARM Cortex-A55 (Mainline Linux framework, standard POSIX, V4L2 M2M)
architecture_bounds.realtime_domain: XuanTie E906/E907 RISC-V Core (Bare-metal / Melis RTOS via local ITCM/DTCM)

engineering_mandate.workflow: Strictly mainline Linux syntax. Leverage Bootlin/Paul Kocialkowski upstream baselines.
engineering_mandate.register_reference: Use Radxa linux-aw2501 tree purely as an open-book TRM for register footprints.
engineering_mandate.riscv_strategy: Reverse engineer and pull initialization sequences directly from Allwinner's official sunxi-melis SDK.
engineering_mandate.npu_strategy: Completely reject closed vendor Acuity stacks and proprietary /dev/galcore drivers. Enforce mainline Etnaviv and Mesa Teflon delegate.

logging_audit_policy.trace_log_format: Markdown (.md) tracking TRM/Bootlin/Melis/Mesa vs Mainline translation logic
required_artifacts: .patch files formatted cleanly for buildroot out-of-tree trees / upstream RFC
